sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59645" key="kranourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾰνουργός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maker of helmets</tr_>; and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾰνο-ουργία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.155</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
